content: Fun iṣelọpọ ika ọwọ adaṣe pẹlu awoṣe ti o ni ẹya ni gbogbo aala isopọ, Mo ṣe iṣeduro lilo ẹrọ titẹ 3D ti o ni agbara giga, gẹgẹbi ẹrọ SLA (Stereolithography) tabi DLP (Digital Light Processing). Awọn ẹrọ wọnyi n pese ipari giga ati alaye to dara fun awọn ẹya kekere ati awọn ẹya ti o ni awọn alaye to nipọn, ti o yẹ fun awọn awoṣe ika ọwọ ti o nilo deede ati didara fun ayẹwo ibamu ISO 32170 lori iṣakoso adehun API.
